CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name ='Development', HYPERLINK( 'https://cgph.my.salesforce.com/ui/list/FilterEditPage?id=00BUq000000QP7d&fval1='&LEFT( Id ,15)&'&retURL=%2Fa3g&cancelURL=%2Fa3g%2Fo', 'Click Here', '_blank' ) , HYPERLINK( 'https://cgph.my.salesforce.com/ui/list/FilterEditPage?id=00BUq000000QP7d&fval1='&LEFT( Development_address__r.Id ,15)&'&retURL=%2Fa3g&cancelURL=%2Fa3g%2Fo', 'Click Here', '_blank' ) )
CustomField.label: Development Target Dates List
